title: Significant New Activity Review groups - Canada.ca
content:
## Significant New Activity Review groups
The tables below contain lists of substances included in each Significant New Activity (SNAc) Review group. Chemical Abstract Service Registry Numbers (CAS RNs) or confidential identifiers are indicated where available.
For more information, read about the SNAc Review process or consult the SNAc publications under the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 .
- Aromatic Azo and Benzidine-Based Substances SNAc Review Group
- Consumer Product SNAc Review Group
- High Hazard, Not in Commerce Substances SNAc Review Group
- Nanomaterials SNAc Review Group
- Remaining Existing Substances SNAc Review Group
- Remaining New Substances SNAc Review Group
